attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.LANGUAGE_CODE, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.MESSAGE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.MESSAGE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.MESSAGE_TEXT, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.TYPE1, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.MAX_LENGTH, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.SEVERITY, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.FND_LOG_SEVERITY, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES,
 (
 select APPLICATION_ID ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,MESSAGE_NAME ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES
 minus
 select APPLICATION_ID ,LANGUAGE_CODE ,MESSAGE_NAME ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.APPLICATION_ID = STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.APPLICATION_ID and  ACM.MESSAGE_NAME = STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.MESSAGE_NAME and ACM.LANGUAGE_CODE = STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.LANGUAGE_CODE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_NEW_MESSAGES)
